title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Wadhwa Group

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Wadhwa Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Wadhwa Group in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Wadhwa Group:
Wadhwa Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wadhwa Group!
